overall.description: First-person nighttime hike along a narrow, rocky dirt trail through a grassy forest area. The path is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, creating a small pool of visibility against the pitch-black surroundings.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the uneven dirt path, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight to navigate the rocky terrain

entered.detail: narrow unpaved path with scattered rocks and uneven dirt surface
tall grass lining the left side of the trail
tall grass lining the right side of the trail
dark silhouette of trees forming a dense forest boundary ahead
dark night sky visible as a narrow strip above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the rocky path and surrounding grass while the dense tree line ahead remains mostly obscured in darkness. No other people or animals are visible in the isolated nighttime setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded forest trail, maintaining a focused pool of light against an oppressive nighttime void. It begins by tracking steadily along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal a rocky surface and patches of wild grass. As the camera advances, the beam flickers across the immediate terrain, keeping the surrounding dense tree line mostly obscured in deep shadow. The scene persists in this state of isolated progression, moving deeper into the pitch-black wilderness while the light remains the sole guide through the silent forest.
